[README.md]
54: - **Slack**: workspace-level OAuth, team identity, sync orchestration, source connection tracking
55: - **Google Workspace**: Gmail/Drive/Docs/Calendar-oriented OAuth and sync orchestration
56: - **GitHub**: org/user connection flow plus repository-aware source registration
68: - **Enterprise Security**: SQL injection protection, XSS prevention, authentication, rate limiting
69: - **Comprehensive Monitoring**: Health checks, metrics collection, performance tracking
70: - **Robust Error Handling**: Structured logging, audit trails, graceful degradation
71: - **Data Integrity**: Database constraints, validation, backup & recovery procedures
72: - **Production Deployment**: Docker containers, reverse proxy, SSL/TLS support
98: ### 🔒 **Security & Authentication**
99: - **Enterprise-grade authentication** with JWT tokens and scope-based authorization
100: - **Input validation and sanitization** preventing SQL injection and XSS attacks
